name: Embork
description: A boar wreathed in smoldering embers. Its bristles ignite when threatened.

moves.name: ⚔️ Tusk Slam
moves.desc: Charges and gores the enemy hard. May cause flinch.

moves.name: 🔥 Ember Bite
moves.desc: Scorching bite with a chance to burn.

moves.name: 😵 Confuse Ray
moves.desc: Disorients the enemy with heat shimmer.

moves.name: 💊 Heal Pulse
moves.desc: Draws warmth from the earth to restore HP.

moves.name: 💉 Poison Tusk
moves.desc: Venomous gore with a chance to poison.

moves.name: 💤 Ember Lull
moves.desc: Warm smoke drifts over the enemy, inducing sleep.

moves.name: 📈 Wild Charge
moves.desc: Embork works itself into a frenzy, raising ATK.
